I was facing this issue because, in the EWM master against the material, the inspection plan group number was not maintained therefore system was not able to release the inspection lot automatically. After an EWM consultant maintained that number it got released automatically upon its creation.

entry.title: Introducing Data & Analytics Maturity Assessment of “SAP Data and Analytics Advisory Methodology"
entry.content:
In the last blog, I announced the new release of the “SAP Data and Analytics Advisory Methodology”. One of the improvements is the introduction of a Data and Analytics Maturity Assessment used in phase IV. This tool helps to evaluate data governance and organizational aspects that are essential for a successful realization of the value proposition defined for the business outcomes in phase II.
Thus, this blog provides guidance how to apply the maturity assessment to identify improvement actions that are considered in the roadmap afterwards.

Overview of the Data and Analytics Maturity Assessment

The “SAP Data and Analytics Advisory Methodology” focuses on data & analytics architecture development. But even the best architecture is ineffective when critical data governance processes, policies, key roles, and competencies are not established within the organization. Therefore, the methodology provides a general investigation of data governance-related topics to identify critical gaps that impact the architecture’s ability to deliver effective value.

This maturity assessment offers a total of 15 data governance and organizational focus topics from five dimensions, which can be assessed first from the current perspective and then for the desired future state. The assessment comprises five maturity levels, ranging from “initial” to “data-driven”.

Not all governance topics in context of the architectural investigation are equally important. It is sufficient to select and analyze the most relevant aspects.
The maturity assessment is used in phase IV of the methodology and is organized in two parts:

  • Part 1 covers topics related to critical data governance topics like data strategy, data quality & KPI’s, data architecture and processes.
  • Part 2 addresses typical data governance and management roles, their responsibilities, and interactions in an organization.

Let’s have a look into the two parts of the assessment in more detail.

Part 1: Assessing data governance focus topics

Data governance is a crucial framework that outlines the rules, processes, and accountabilities necessary for organizations to effectively manage their data. This comprehensive approach treats data as a product, ensuring that it meets specific standards and delivers value to both internal and external stakeholders. When data is handled in this manner, it is referred to as a "data product".
The key components of data governance are:

  • Rules: include standards, policies, and guidelines that set the foundation for data management.
  • Processes: the mechanisms that facilitate data management and decision-making on relevant topics.
  • Roles & Accountability: defines the responsibilities and decision rights for data management.

Managing "data as a product" involves overseeing its availability, usability, security, and integrity to deliver business value. The goal of data governance is to ensure the right data reaches the right person at the right time, and at the expected quality, enabling informed decision-making that drives business outcomes.

The first part of the maturity assessment starts to investigate the data strategy as a baseline to establish data & analytics as a core competency. This is followed by looking into KPI’s to track data strategy execution and assess data quality. Then data architecture is analyzed that is important to provide a common understanding of data. Finally, we investigate data governance processes to ensure sufficient data quality and deliver tailored reporting, analytics and business AI solutions.

Part 2: Assessing organizational focus topics 

Part two of this maturity assessment focuses on the dimension “organization”. Here you evaluate the readiness of the organization regarding roles and teams contributing to the data governance and identify improvement potential.

In a mature data-driven organization, data governance and management teams consist of several roles, each with distinct responsibilities and skills.
Examples include:

  • Chief Data Officer: responsible for maintaining data quality, security, and compliance, as well as promoting innovation and data-driven decision-making within the organization.
  • Data Steward: enforce data governance policies and procedures and ensure compliance with data regulations.
  • Data Domain Owner: manages a specific area or domain of data within an organization to ensure accuracy, integrity, security, and availability.

Such roles are part of the data governance, which is recognized as an overarching responsibility within the organization. Nevertheless, it is crucial to define the structure of governance boards and teams to establish and enforce data governance rules and policies effectively.
This structure includes:

  • Data Governance Council: provides strategic guidance of data governance programs, prioritizes data governance projects and initiatives, and approves organization-wide data policies and standards. Data Governance Council: provides
  • Data Governance Team(s): define Data Governance policies, roles, methods, processes, tools etc. (Framework), enforcing data standards and collaborating with operational teams to resolve governance issues
  • Data Domain Teams: apply data governance policies, rules, methods, tools etc. on daily basis, manage data product demand & requirements and ensure their data quality and security.

The "organization" dimension of the maturity assessment evaluates in how far such roles and teams are established in the company.

The following five focus topics are assessed:

Procedure of maturity assessment

Although the maturity assessment is divided into two parts the assessment can be executed in one session, e.g. in a workshop with relevant stakeholders. To perform the maturity assessment, the following steps are carried out:

  • Select data & analytics governance focus topics from the five dimensions relevant to the scope of the assessment and target architecture.
  • Assess current maturity for selected topics, either collectively or by the individual stakeholders.
  • Assess future maturity by discussing whether the current level of maturity is sufficient or whether a higher level is required.
  • If the current and required maturity levels diverge, then necessary actions must be agreed upon and incorporated into the final roadmap.
    The Data & Analytics Advisory Methodology provides a template with a detailed description of each focus topic and its maturity levels.

Here is one example where four relevant focus topics were assessed:

 

In case current and desired maturity levels are different you should document what the gap is and what actions need to be taken to get to the to-be maturity level.

In the example above a data strategy was not existing but was considered as essential to provide the guardrails and guidelines to improve overall data & analytics governance. Also, the skills and knowledge in the organization required to work with data and create business value (data literacy) was not sufficient. Thus, follow up actions were defined to organize a data strategy development initiative and define a training plan to improve data literacy.

If this general assessment leads to the conclusion that data governance needs to be investigated in more detail, please refer to related frameworks from SAP (SAP Data Management Framework) or SAP partners.

In the next blog I will explain phase IV of the “SAP Data and Analytics Advisory Methodology” in its entirety with a focus on developing the architecture roadmap.

entry.title: Re: FICO-Reset company code data before changing the chart of accounts

entry.title: Re: FICO-Reset company code data before changing the char...
entry.content: Kindly refer KBA 3464871 - Error "Reset company code data before changing the chart of accounts" is raised - SAP S/4HANA Cloud

entry.title: SuccessFactors Mentoring: Can administrators enrol mentors on their behalf?
entry.content:
Hello mentoring experts

I have a customer that wants to use supervised mentoring programmes and sign up the same mentors for each cycle. They will use a group to do this. What they then want to do is enrol those mentors into the programme on their behalf, so that the mentors do not have to go through the join up process each time?

Is there a way to do this please?

SAP SuccessFactors Succession & Development

entry.title: Re: Reclassification method does not consider Preparation...
entry.content: No - without this feature the reclassification filters out PCC data, i.e. behaves as if this new option would not be enabled.

entry.title: Currency conversion is not functioning incorrect setup issue with public cloud
entry.content:
Dear All,

I am writing to address an important issue we are facing regarding the currency conversions within our newly created company code in Hong Kong. As per the default settings in the SAP public cloud, the company code currency is set to HKD, while our intended currency is USD.

Following our previous discussions with SAP, we have attempted to maintain the functional currency as USD as guided by the relevant Snote. However, we are currently encountering discrepancies when transactions are posted in EUR; these amounts are being converted first to HKD and then to USD, which is resulting in differences that we cannot account for.

To resolve this, we need to ensure that the conversion is consistently made from EUR directly to USD without the intermediate HKD conversion. I would appreciate your insights or any further steps we can take to rectify this situation.

entry.title: Is it possible to integrate a sapui5 BarcodeScanner in CAPM application..?
entry.content:
Hi team 😃,

I was working fine with SAPUI5 framework based FIORI apps. Recently I have enrolled in a CAPM training. I got an doubt that Is it possible to integrate a sapui5 BarcodeScanner in CAPM application. I searched for proper technical answer but found nothing. I understood that when it is about data manipulation we can do awesome job with CDS based JavaScript ecosystem, but when it is about implementing custom applications like scanner, camera is it feasible through CAPM. I am sorry if i have posted without proper understanding, I am still learning.

SAPUI5

entry.title: Re: SAP Intercompany Settlement process in Condition contract in S4 Hana

entry.title: Re: Attachement API
entry.content:
Hi @Connie__ 

 

The API API_CV_ATTACHMENT_SRV does not currently support the Product Master for adding documents

Please submit a feature request if you would like it added

 

Best Regards

Enda

entry.title: I cannot preview layout (SAP B1 HANA)
entry.content: Some modules in SAP B1 cannot print preview layouts; for example, inventory transfer I preview by using system layout and crystal report, but the preview window does not display. Can you give some suggestions on how to check log or solve this problem? Thank you.

entry.title: Re: Calling UI5 transaction F0763A in web browser
entry.content:
This SSCUI opens in new pop-up window, it is most likely blocked by browser by default. Once pop-ups are allowed for the system address, SSCUI will open correctly.

In Edge/Chrome for example, there is an icon in the rightmost part of address bar, pop-ups can be allowed there.

Kindly refer KBA 3419948 - Getting information 'Calling UI5 transaction F0763A in web browser' when trying to access SSCUI 150002 Manage Chart of Accounts

entry.title: Re: Attachment size control
entry.content:
Hi @Connie__ 

 

Currently the size of files , what document type is not restrictable .

 

For allowed Mime Types , please check the post 

 

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-q-a/allowed-file-formats-for-dms-upload-in-s-4hana-public-cloud/qaq-p/12572077

 

Best Regards

Enda

entry.title: Re: Attachment size control

entry.title: Re: Attachement API
entry.content: Adding tag SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Research and Development

entry.title: Fleet Management SAP PM - synchronisation with financial assets
entry.content:
Dear all,

I would like to automatically update fields between equipment master (Fleet managment) and financial asset master - especially license plate number.

Enhancements: AAPM0001 (transaction: SMOD), components: EXIT_SAPLAAPM_001 & EXIT_SAPLAAPM_002 were already used for updating other fields of equipment master (non-fleet mgmt.), that were not available in the standard list. 

Can this be also used for fields of fleet management? If not, what would be a valid alternative?

Thanks Sunnyi 🙂

entry.title: Dump Created while fetching data TSV_TNEW_PAGE_ALLOC_FAILED
entry.content:
Hi.

I am fetching data from below code.
While fetching from CDPOS ..Dump is created. 
As per my analysis ..What i understood is ..It is having memory issue. 
Table CDHDR is nearly having 27 Lakhs records. Due to this Dump is created.

My Question is without using Hana In Program itself is there any possible way to solve the issue. 
Some logic I am thinking.
1)First need to count total records from CDHDR.
2)Then while fetching CDHDR table i need to split, it into batches like up to 1 lakh records then remaining process like Fetching data from CDPOS and other remaining process need to complete, then remaining records again from CDHDR Need to process it.. until total records over.

But how to implement I would like to know?

SELECT objectclas,objectid, changenr, username, udate, utime, tcode FROM cdhdr INTO TABLE @DATA(lt_cdhdr)
WHERE objectclas IN @LR_objectclas AND username IN @s_user AND udate IN @LR_daterange.


IF lt_cdhdr IS NOT INITIAL.
SELECT objectclas, objectid, changenr, tabname, tabkey, fname, chngind, value_new, value_old FROM cdpos INTO TABLE @DATA(lt_cdpos)
FOR ALL ENTRIES IN @LT_cdhdr
WHERE changenr = @LT_cdhdr-changenr.

entry.title: Re: SAPUI5 PDFViewer Not Working : Underlying iframe was not found in DOM.
entry.content:
Just for information, I've just tried my application on EDGE and the PDF is displayed correctly...

So the problem is mainly on Chrome?

Any idea why ?

entry.title: Analytics Cloud Top-N is not supported in a charts with structures
entry.content:
Hello 

I am having a live model connected to a query in BW4H, the query contains a huge structure for contribution margin calculation. On top of the model there is a story with a chart, the chart displays one measure and one entry of the structure. I would like to use a rank option but it is greyed out and says it is not supported. See attachment

Any workaround or idea?

entry.title: Where can I how learn the Drive service captures car mileage and what are the benefits?
entry.content:
I recommend to access our Capturing Car Mileage with Drive on IOS (iPhone/iPad) learning journey.

Overview
This learning journey introduces you to how the Drive service captures car mileage and helps simplify the expense reporting process for efficient and accurate reimbursements.

Learning objectives

  • Explain what Drive is, its features, and its benefits for mileage capture.
  • Identify the recommended phone and tablet settings for optimal use.
  • Demonstrate proficiency in capturing mileage using the different options offered by Drive.
  • Identify and follow the steps to expense car trips created with Drive.

Pass all the quizzes and receive a digital badge

 

Please ask a question related to the digital learning Journey in the Q&A area.

Our SAP Learning Experts will get back to you as soon as possible! We are here to support you. 

I appreciate your feedback and we will make sure to continue sharing interesting topics.

Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: How to apply condition on subform without script language in adobe form in sap
entry.content:
Hello all,

I'v one adobe form, in which it has two output (design) based on the condition 1 and condition 2. I'm calling this form from ALV Report (driver code), i'm passing a value if that value matches to the condition 1 then "first output" should be displayed, and if that value matches to the condition 2 then "second output" should be displayed.
both the outputs are wrapped in subform and both are present on Master Page. and these subforms should get visible / hidden according to the condition.
Also in the "second output" it is compulsory to have QR code on LAST PAGE.
You can consider conditions like -
condition 1 = 'ABC'
condition 2 = 'PQR' 

 thanks in advance.

entry.title: CVI - DEBMAS/ CREMAS mapping (CL_MD_BP_MAINTAIN)
entry.content:
Hi gurus, 

is there a way to mapping fields from IDOC CREMAS/ DEBMAS into the structure of CL_MD_BP_MAINTAIN for CVI. 

I want to use method VALIDATE_SINGLE and then MAINTAIN as suggested from SAP guidelines, but i want to know if there's a way to map an IDOC CREMAS/ DEBMAS into the structures of this class automatically. 

Thanks!!!!!

entry.title: Re: SAP Adobe Forms - Question mark field
entry.content: Just in case someone has the same problem. I delete all the tables inside the form and recreate them with same names, bindings and other properties, and everything work fine.

Have a nice day,
Jean-Louis

entry.title: occurs obsolete abap
entry.content:
hi,

I need to create a table that takes a structure that I created in SE11.
I used the Occors command:

DATA: gt_test LIKE ZTEST OCCURS 1000.

what can I use instead of occurs?

thank you

entry.title: Question regarding the migration to the CSD and third-party IDP
entry.content:
Hi Everyone-

 

We have a question regarding the migration to the CSD and third-party IDP.

In this blog it says that Customers would develop, design, develop, test and deploy automation or develop and execute manual procedures to update configurations needed on 3rd party IDP related to 3rd party cookie deprecation, and SuccessFactors SSO certification expiration.

Can you confirm that they still use their third-party provider in the future with the new CSD and that they don´t necessarily need to migrate to IAS? In other words, if they do the required updates in their third-party IDP, it is ok to not migrate to IAS?

 

Link to blog-  https://userapps.support.sap.com/sap/support/knowledge/en/3459706

 

https://community.sap.com/t5/product-and-customer-updates/migration-to-sap-cloud-identity-authentication-ias-ips-innovation-alert-amp/ba-p/271407?emcs_t=S2h8ZW1haWx8dG9waWNfc3Vic2NyaXB0aW9ufE0wNUJXS0FRNVY4Q1BVfDEzODAzNzg5fFNVQlNDUklQVElPTlN8aEs

entry.title: Re: Error Printing a rpt in a Shipping
entry.content:
Appears to be a permission issue in their software.

I suggest contacting them for support.

entry.title: CAP: How to call remote service with same XSUAA in background job
entry.content:
I have two services A and B in different CAP apps that share the same XSUAA. I'd like service A to call the remote service B in a background job. This results in a 401 error as there is no auth token. 

  cds.spawn({}, async () => {
      const serviceB = await cds.connect.to("B"); 
      await serviceB.send("foo", {}); // 401 error
    });

Service B does have a destination configured

  "requires": {
    "B": {
      "kind": "odata",
      "model": "./srv/external/B",
      "[production]": {
        "credentials": {
          "path": "/api/",
          "destination": "b-api",
          "forwardAuthToken": true
        }
      },
  }

Remote calls to service B work as intended when initiated inside request handling, as there is an auth token to be forwarded.

serviceA.on("bar", async () => {
  const serviceB = await cds.connect.to("B");
  await serviceB.send("foo", {}); // works
});

Is there a way for CAP to handle this automatically or do I have to fetch the token manually and set it in the header?

entry.title: Re: Where can I find the change number used in MM12 trans...
entry.content:
Hello Allen,

 

You can goto MM02, and from environment menu click on display changes.

 

thanks,

entry.title: Re: Padding is invalid and cannot be removed
entry.content: And did you impliment the suggested work arounds on that post?

entry.title: Where can I start learning how to set up and use SAP Enable Now to create learning content?
entry.content:
I recommend to access our Implementing and Using SAP Enable Now learning journey.

Overview
In this learning journey, you will learn how to set up and use SAP Enable Now to create sustainable learning content and provide performance support.

Learning objectives
After completing this learning journey, you can collaboratively perform the following in SAP Enable Now:

  • Implement and set up SAP Enable Now for producing learning content, both for strategic and project-based use. 
  • Create learning content in various formats such as simulations, quizzes, animations.
  • Edit learning content and on top of the formats listed above insert media such as videos or links to other resources.
  • Localize learning content.
  • Deliver sustainable learning material and performance support.

Prerequisites

  • As a prerequisite, familiarize with our SAP Enable Now discovery content on SAP Help Portal

Book your certification exam
Validate your skills and learning by completing the certification exam and gain a highly recognised accreditation.

 


Please ask a question related to the digital learning Journey in the Q&A area.

Our SAP Learning Experts will get back to you as soon as possible! We are here to support you. 

I appreciate your feedback and we will make sure to continue sharing interesting topics.

Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: Re: Easy way to create APIs in SAP using standard classes
entry.content: Thank you for the good post. May I ask though, where is the API key, how does one get this? I can only see that you created a URL. I need to to generate an API key and am looking for blogs on how to do this.

entry.title: Re: in the Fressh Machine CRRuntime_64bit_13_0_22 fails t...
entry.content:
Refer to the supported Platforms page:

https://www.sap.com/documents/2016/06/f871031e-757c-0010-82c7-eda71af511fa.html

SQL Server 2019 is not supported until SP 27, you are using SP 22.

Upgrade your projects runtime, and no you can't just install SP 27, developer must rebuild the application.

entry.title: SAP Asset Manager - delta sync ignoring syclo changes sent by transport
entry.content:
I have noticed when

  • I change syclo configuration (/SYCLO/CONFIGPANEL ODATA -> Data Filter),
  • save changes to request,
  • transport request to Test system,
  • on mobile device perform delta synchronization, data are not synced correctly. New changes in the Data filter are not applied.

When I modify data on test system, delta synchronization will work. But If I do not change data but only changes in syclo were made, delta synchronization will not send data by current filter settings.

For example: Notifications => Item => Part group (list picker values) does not update values after delta sync. But if I reset the application and perform the initial full synchronization => list picker gets the correct current values.

I this correct behaviour of delta sync or am I missing something in syclo configuration?

entry.title: In SAC, using the Data Export API, how do I export the dimension hierarchies?
entry.content:
Hello everyone.

I have the Data Export working so I can export all the dimension members.   I'm using this endpoint:

/providers/{NamespaceID}/{ProviderID}/{DimensionName}Master | SAP Help Portal

I can get almost everything I need but I cannot see the hierarchies.  How do get those?  Is it from a different endpoint?  I looked through all the endpoints in the documentation it's not really obvious. I could try each in turn but I thought I'd ask before doing that.  

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: Asking and Answering Questions in the Community After Migration
entry.content:
Hi, @Aruna9:

Please read the post on this page. You shouldn't be asking a question as a comment. You won't get an answer this way. 

We have a tutorial, FAQs, videos, and all kinds of resources to teach you how to ask questions properly in our community. Please take some time to familiarize yourself with the process and our rules (because you also posted the same question incorrectly here https://community.sap.com/t5/what-s-new/what-you-need-to-know-about-blogging-post-migration/bc-p/13863165/emcs_t/S2h8ZW1haWx8dG9waWNfc3Vic2NyaXB0aW9ufE0wWVRMMk5TODBFRE1BfDEzODYzMTY1fFNVQlNDUklQVElPTlN8aEs#M531, and that violates our rules of engagement).

Our members and I would like to assist you, but you have to participate in the community correctly in order for us to do so.

I ask that you please post the question in the proper Q&A board and report your two replies as inappropriate, so the moderation team can easily remove them from the site. 

Kind regards,

--Jerry

entry.title: Re: What You Need to Know About Blogging Post-Migration
entry.content:
Hello, @Aruna9:

Please see my reply at https://community.sap.com/t5/what-s-new/asking-and-answering-questions-in-the-community-after-migration/bc-p/13865116/highlight/true#M533 and follow the instructions that I provided there.

Kind regards,

--Jerry

entry.title: 🔵 Getting Started with Agents using SAP Generative AI Hub
entry.content:
"AI agents" have quickly become one of the most exciting topics in technology, sparking interest across industries.

In this session, we'll break down what AI agents really are, trying to bring some clarity to the concept while diving into their transformative potential. More than just theory, we'll walk you through practical steps for building and implementing agents using the SAP Generative AI Hub. Whether you're new to AI or looking for practical insights, this session will give you the tools to start using AI agents today.

Speaker: Mathis Boerner

entry.title: How to open the Fiori App "Create Purchase Requisitions" from a custom Fiori App and fill Positions?
entry.content:
Is it somehow possible to Open the Fiori App "Create Purchase Requisitions" from my custom Fiori App, which i created in SAP BAS and automatically fill some positions in the Purchase Requisition?

If it is possible please let me know how.

entry.title: Using SAP Cloud ALM for Service in SAP Cloud ALM, tenant extensions
entry.content:
As announced via this blog, SAP Cloud ALM, tenant extensions are now available for customers. This means that customers can procure as many tenants as they need.

For SAP Cloud ALM for Service, most content, including

  • which services will be delivered
  • what the results of these deliveries were
  • what the identified actionable items were

is sent into your tenant from SAP as explained in this blog. You as a customer have the option the decide for which of your customer numbers service information should be sent to which of your SAP Cloud ALM tenants (via tenant mapping).

SAP Cloud ALM, tenant extensions, are NOT available for tenant mapping. That means only standard SAP Cloud ALM tenants can receive service information from SAP.

In all SAP Cloud ALM, tenant extensions:

  • The "Service Delivery Center" will not contain any data.
  • The "Issues and Actions Management" app will not contain any data.

Customers using SAP Cloud ALM, tenant extensions, can only use their standard SAP Cloud ALM tenants for managing their service deliveries and working with the issues and actions identified during service deliveries.

entry.title: Re: Global Trade Management - From Business Suite to S/4HANA
entry.content:
Dear Peter, 

congratulations to this blog, very informative.

I am new to GTM though and would be looking for basic information to get started. I tried to check in SAP Process Navigator what I can find for GTM but failed. Do you know if there is any documentation available in Signavio / Process Navigator?

Or any other source of information you may be able to share, like an implementation guide document?

thanks

Florian

entry.title: Where comes libraries.csv from?
entry.content:
Hi,

when I double click a Crystal Report File (*.rpt), beside the dev_rfc.log also a libraries.csv-file is created.
I think it contains all DLLs used when the Report is shown. Here is a short excerpt from the file:
'C:\Program Files (x86)\SAP BusinessObjects\SAP BusinessObjects Enterprise XI 4.0\win64_x64\crlang.dll';'shared_library_utils::library::signature::eUntrust'
'C:\Windows\SYSTEM32\dwmapi.dll';'shared_library_utils::library::signature::eTrust'
'C:\Program Files (x86)\SAP BusinessObjects\SAP BusinessObjects Enterprise XI 4.0\win64_x64\cxlib-5-0.dll';'shared_library_utils::library::signature::eUntrust'
'C:\Program Files (x86)\SAP BusinessObjects\SAP BusinessObjects Enterprise XI 4.0\win64_x64\crlogger.dll';'shared_library_utils::library::signature::eUntrust'
'C:\Windows\WinSxS\amd64_microsoft.windows.common-controls_6595b64144ccf1df_5.82.22621.3527_none_b43b7f4b638cc64f\comctl32.dll';'shared_library_utils::library::signature::eTrust'
'C:\Program Files (x86)\SAP BusinessObjects\SAP BusinessObjects Enterprise XI 4.0\win64_x64\crwdnr.dll';'shared_library_utils::library::signature::eUntrust'
'C:\Program Files (x86)\SAP BusinessObjects\SAP BusinessObjects Enterprise XI 4.0\win64_x64\crw64_res_de.dll';'shared_library_utils::library::signature::eUntrust'
'C:\Windows\SYSTEM32\kernel.appcore.dll';'shared_library_utils::library::signature::eTrust'
'C:\Windows\System32\bcryptPrimitives.dll';'shared_library_utils::library::signature::eTrust'
'C:\Windows\System32\MSCTF.dll';'shared_library_utils::library::signature::eTrust'
'C:\Windows\SYSTEM32\TextShaping.dll';'shared_library_utils::library::signature::eTrust'
The file ist typically 60K long. Is there a way to suppress the file creation?
Thanks
Robert

entry.title: Re: Number Range objects
entry.content: Hi Peter, thank you for the response. When I created the number range object in DEV, I do see it listed in "manage Number Range Interval" app. And even after transporting to Test, I see it listed in the app where I could create the intervals manually. But when the transport reaches customer system, I could see it listed in the app even though I have the roles roles that you specified.

entry.title: Re: Announcing SAP Analytics Cloud, add-in for Microsoft Office!
entry.content:
Alright I start to understand but maybe somebody can confirm:

Only install source for Analytics Cloud for Excel is MS STore - no other option. And many companies do not allow this installation source.

There is no longer a software version for install (outside MS Store) on Office as a desktop version addin. I tried to find the installer resources for SAP Analytics CLoud for Excel but was not able to. I only found Analysis for Office - but this is the outdated one as stated e.g. see below.

So all in all, we must use the outdated software if the software delivery over MS Store is not possible within the company policies. Very strange policy  to deliver software really.

Thanks for any comments.

---

AO PAM 2.8 (sap.com)

SAP Analysis for Microsoft Office (also known as AFO)
continues to be an important add-in for multiple data sources like SAP BW, HANA, BPC, S/4 and Group Reporting. It is designed for financial analysts who require analytical capabilities in Microsoft Excel. It can also be used with SAP Analytics Cloud and SAP Datasphere connectivity (Analytical Dataset only).
However, all feature investments are being made exclusively in in SAP Analytics Cloud, add-in for Microsoft Office, which is our strategic solution, built on top of Microsoft Office 365. Roadmap can be found here.

entry.title: Re: Number Range objects
entry.content: Sorry, I meant I do not see the number range object in the app in the customer system.

entry.title: Re: SAP Cloud Integration - Trading Partner Management - OData to EDI Interface (ProcessDirect)
entry.content: How are you converting ODATA message to SOAP message so that it is accepted at TPM for further processing?

entry.title: 🔵 How to build a GenAI application using SAP Build, Generative AI Hub and Amazon Bedrock
entry.content:
Streamlining GenAI development is crucial for staying ahead in today's competitive landscape. Amazon Bedrock, SAP Generative AI Hub, and SAP Build offer a powerful synergy that simplifies the entire process, from building to integrating and optimizing GenAI applications. This session explores the seamless interoperability of these tools, showcasing their benefits in terms of model options, performance, and cost optimization. Gain insights from real-world demos and learn how other customers are leveraging this integrated approach to accelerate their GenAI initiatives.

Speaker: Rajeswari Malladi and Abhi Shivaditya, Amazon

entry.title: Re: SAP Digital Manufacturing - subscribe to MQTT topics
entry.content:
Hi,

if anyone also faces this problem, you will have to upload certificate chain (see SAP help portal -> MQTT brokers -> Production connectors) not in the page where you are able to generate a client certificate but on the page of basic information of the broker. Further, with Misquitto it seems to be difficult to authorize via client certificate, with Apache ActiveMQ it now works.

BR
Fabian

entry.title: Re: Execute BEx queries at the same time
entry.content:
Now, on one of the workstation where second BEx query was executing without delay, it's running incorrect (with delay).

No settings have been changed either in the system or in the browser!

entry.title: Availability control in SAP-BCS -Funds management Module
entry.content:
Hi All.

we are implementing  FM module with BCS .i have done the configuration .Budget entered in TC-FMBB and released the budget with TC-FMBBC.when i am posting a FI entry with amount more than the PB budget system is not allowing. So correct only. But when i am posting FI entry with amount much less than the PB system is showing error as

Annual budget exceeded by 50.000,00 INR (FM CB Availability Control) for document item 00002

Message no. FMAVC005

Diagnosis

The annual budget is exceeded by 50.000,00 INR (FM CB Availability Control) for the document item 00002. Budget control on outgoing amounts ( ceiling type Expenditures) raised this message for the following combination of availability control ledger, fiscal year (and if applicable, year of cash effectivity) and control object:

9I/2024/900150/760300

Further notes

You can display the amounts for the control object mentioned above by using transaction FMAVCR01 or, if the control object refers to an automatic cover group, by using transaction FMCEMON01. However, the amounts shown in reporting normally do not take into account the amounts of the current document.

Now my doubt is why system is checking commitment budget as shown below.Please guide me where i am going wrong.

Regards,

NKM

FM CB Availability Control

entry.title: Re: SAP Activate Project manager Certification
entry.content:
Hi @Rizwan17 

Hi @Rizwan17 

If you are referring to E_ACTAI certification please access our SAP Certified Specialist - Project Manager - SAP Activate for Agile Implementation Management website where you can View sample questions

If you refer to the C_ ACT - SAP Certified Associate – Project Manager certification 
Please access our  SAP Certified Associate - Project Manager - SAP Activate where you can view View sample questions

Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: PAPM On Premise - Unable to see "Calculation" tabs in modeling
entry.content:
Hi all,

I'm facing a unusual UI bheaviour that started this morning. Since yesterday, in the modeling environment, I was able to see the settings of the different functions of an Environment I was exploring. Now for example, if a click on a Calculation function

 

As you can see, I can't see on the right side the components tabs of a calculation function. Yesterday I was able to see it. Moreover, my colleague see it, see below stamp

I tried to reboot my pc. To delete cookies but nothing changed.

We are also using the same browser.

Any suggestions to solve this issue?

Thanks

entry.title: "Column store error" in database frequently
entry.content:
Dear Expert,

We have a total database size is more than 110 GB. We have a number of licenses 120.
We have to know the required hardware specifications for Application and Database server for getting uninterrupted production environment.
Kindly provide us the details.

We are getting 'GetRecords : column store error: search table error:  [1000002] exception 1000002:' in database frequently. Kindly let us know, what is the cause of this error and how do we can overcome it?
And Please let us know, is it possible to shrink the database size. if it is possible please tell the process steps for done it.

And we are having 512GB License memory, Peak memory reached up to 320 Gb on peak hours. When trying to cross beyond 320GB, Hana DB gets disconnected and its throw "Cannot allocate enough Memory" in HANA studio.

Due to this our daily data base backup also getting failed with "Column Store error".

Kindly help us to resolve this issue ASAP.

entry.title: Re: How and when to truncate log file in database mirroring setup (SQL Anywhere 17.0.11.7458)
entry.content:
We run a backup everynight as well. We use DBBACKUP that comes with SQLA. When the backup runs the current log is archived and a new one started and this carries over to the mirror. So, we never have to truncate the log as it is reset every night with the backup. Unless I am misunderstanding something with your question.

Further, we never backup the database directory because the dbbackup backs the database up to another directory/drive on the server. We then run directory backups of that backup location off the server.

entry.title: SAP Build Apps how to change the font color when hovering over an element?
entry.content:
hello

I'm trying to learn SAP Build App.

is there a way to change the font color when hovering over an element?

thank you

entry.title: Re: An Implementation of Text-to-SQL with AI
entry.content:
Good, thanks for clarifying! Also that process hierarchy adds a lot of value to the blog.

For the readers we would then say that the intent determination piece can be enhanced by leveraging a vector capability (could be HANA Cloud) to better capture the intentions of the question. Vectorizing will help in many angles like scalability or metadata additions.

Again, great blog! Text to SQL will be one of the most used features going forward.

entry.title: Re: SAP Cloud ALM, tenant extension now available on the SAP Price List

entry.title: What is the best source for learning SAP Build Apps?
entry.content:
hello

What is the best source for learning SAP Build Apps?

thank you

entry.title: API & CDS view for Display Multilevel BoM (S/4HANA Public Cloud)
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

According to our requirement under  FG we have several SFG and ram material components assigned to each SFG  materials should be available as displayed in the application Display Multi level BoM ( TCODE : CS12)for forms customization. We  checked the API and CDS views related to it but couldn't find one .Hence kindly suggest us the related API and CDS views ASAP.

Thank you

kind regards

Thangaraj Thomas

entry.title: Re: Integrating SAP S/4HANA Data into SAP HANA Cloud Using SAP Datasphere
entry.content: @mkaufman thank you so much. Indeed we found an issue. The fix is being pushed with a plan (no commitment) to be available in Canary on Sep 25 and in Production on Oct 3. Thank you very much for bringing this to our attention.

entry.title: Re: How to consume calculated member in Advanced Formulas.
entry.content:
Hi @N1kh1l 

The configuration "READ_CALUCATED_MEMBER_VALUES" has an adverse effect on the Data action script performance. A complex MDS query is executed to read the calculated member, and the more records there are in the Public edit version(PCD), the greater the impact. Therefore, unless it needs to read the calculated member in the data action script, this configuration should remain off (default).

entry.title: Re: How do I create a custom Leaflet map component
entry.content: Any luck in finding solution to this Maps requirement ?

entry.title: Re: Cloud Transport Management Service -getting error whi...
entry.content:
Hi, this worked for me:

1. Generate a technical platform user at the IAS level, grant them Space Developer permissions on the subaccount and the corresponding TMS roles as indicated in the documentation on help.sap.com

2. Generate destination with OAuth2Password authentication as described in the documentation at help.sap.com, using this technical user created previously.

3. Regarding the CF Deploy URL, do not use the Org ID, rather use the Org Name + Dev space.

entry.title: Business Process Master List (BPML) for SAP EWM project
entry.content: Hi, I am looking for a Business Process Master List (BPML) template for SAP EWM project. Is there anyone in the group who has such kind of document? Thanks.

entry.title: Re: SAP Activate Project manager Certification

entry.title: AVC_Sales variant characteristics assignment to Finished Goods in Configuration Profile

Hello Experts, 

Could you please advise if there is any mass upload template (like any Data Migration template) for Assignment of sale variant characteristics to Finished Goods (Please refer below as in configuration profile).

This requirement is for SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud (Advanced Variant Configuration).

Thank you

kind regards

Thangaraj Thomas

Thanks a lot, @zoebrands ! 

We would like to create stories with spatial widgets. Just like the globe and campus widgets in the demo story, SAP offers in AVPs SAC App!

entry.title: Where can I start learning the core functions and powerful tools of SAP IBP?
entry.content:
I recommend to access our Discovering SAP IBP for Inventory Planning and Optimization learning journey.

Overview
In this course, you will explore the core functions and powerful tools of SAP IBP, with a special focus on Inventory Planning and Optimization. Discover how to leverage scenario simulations, custom alerts, case management, and business network collaboration to enhance your decision-making capabilities and optimize supply chain operations.

Learning objectives

After completing this course, you will be able to implement SAP IBP Inventory Optimization and utilize its key features to optimize inventory management processes within your organization.  

Prerequisites

  • Exploring the Core Functions in SAP IBP
  • Exploring the Tools and Features in SAP IBP
Please ask a question related to the digital learning Journey in the Q&A area.

Our SAP Learning Experts will get back to you as soon as possible! We are here to support you. 

I appreciate your feedback and we will make sure to continue sharing interesting topics.

Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: Re: Attachments2 using HttpClient and C#
entry.content: Hi ANKIT. The same error with .NET httpClient. Based on Fiddler and Service Layer: POST /b1s/v1/Attachments2 HTTP/1.1 Host: mycompany.com:50000 Cookie: B1SESSION=5412064e-71c4-11ef-8000-12c57281de91; ROUTEID=.node4 Accept-Encoding: gzip, deflate Content-Type: multipart/form-data; boundary=c86cf448-3c24-4769-bcb5-fb30989a83d7 Content-Length: 214. Sincerely Jorge.

entry.title: Allow instructors to cancel registration of participants - schedule course sessions.
entry.content:
We are thinking about allowing instructors to record course units. Since we only want to have completed elements in the learning history, we only have “completed” as the completion status. Employees who do not show up or are only partially present are canceled by us. A course instructor should also be able to do this. Course instructors are not allowed to do this, even for free courses.

We are also regularly asked whether instructors can schedule their courses themselves. But I have not been able to find a way to do this either. Is there one?

I have found an enhancement request that is basically about the instructor view, I have attached a comment and would be happy if other companies who would like to use this would vote for it.

https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/idea/276172
Thank you
Sandra

entry.title: Re: SAP CPI Production Order Creation Fails Due to Invalid Time Format in OData Response
entry.content: CPI is throwing an error during what process? You mentioned that it's creating production orders so where is your flow failing?

entry.title: SAP Job Scheduling Service in Kyma: Simple use-case
entry.content:
Abstract

The SAP Job Scheduling service can be consumed both from CF and Kyma environments. You may have seen the blogs about CF - if not, you can find them in the Overview of Blogs.

What are the differences between using the Job Scheduling service for CF and for Kyma:

  • The way you provision the service instance
  • The way you bind the service instance to your application
  • Adding permissions to your user in the BTP cockpit to access the Job Scheduling service dashboard

In addition you will learn:

  • how to use a Dockerfile to build a Docker image for your node app
  • how to publish this image to a docker registry
  • how to define a Kubernetes yaml file with everything needed to deploy your solution - including resources like ServiceInstance, ServiceBinding, APIRule

Prerequisites 📋

  • You have enabled the Kyma environment
  • You have entitlements and quota for the Job Scheduling service
  • kubectl
  • docker (or podman - replace "docker" with "podman" in the commands below)
  • A registration on DockerHub (or some other docker repository)

Here is what the file structure will look like at the end:

kyma-part-1/
├── Dockerfile
├── manifest.yaml
├── package.json
└── server.js 

Steps 🛠️

1. Application 📦

We will start by preparing our application for deployment in Kyma.

We can reuse one of the applications provided in the tutorials for Cloud Foundry.

We define our dependencies in package.json:

{
  "main": "server.js",
  "dependencies": {
    "express": "^4.16.3"
  }
}

Define our endpoint logic in server.js using the express library

const express = require('express');
const app = express();

app.get('/runjob', function(req, res){
   console.log('==> [APP JOB LOG] Job is running . . .');
   res.send('Finished job');
});

const port = process.env.PORT || 3000;
app.listen(port, function(){
   console.log('listening');
})

2. Build and publish a docker image 🐳

In CF we've defined a manifest file and used cf push to deploy it to the platform. In Kubernetes we have one additional step. We need to prepare a docker image before applying our configurations to the cluster.

2.1 Create a Dockerfile 📄

# Use NodeJS base image
FROM node:20

# Create app directory
WORKDIR /usr/src/app

# Install app dependencies by copying package.json and package-lock.json
COPY package*.json ./

# Install dependencies
RUN npm install

# Setting env variables
ENV PORT 80

# Copy app source
COPY . .

# Bind the port on which a container will listen for traffic
EXPOSE 80

# Define the Docker image's behavior at runtime
CMD ["npm","run","start"]

2.2 Build a Docker image 🔨

docker build . -t jobapp:part1

2.3 Create repository on Dockerhub 🗂️

These instructions are for Dockerhub, but you can use any other docker repository you want.

We need this repository to upload the image we've build in the previous step.

  1. Open Dockerhub
  2. After logging in, go to the "Repositories" tab
  3. press "Create Repository" and give it a name jobapp
  4. press "Create"

2.4 Upload the image to a Docker repository ⬆️

  1. Log in to Dockerhub
docker login -u <your-user>

Alternatively: podman login docker.io -u <your-user>

  1. Push the image to your docker registry
docker push <your-user>/jobapp:part1

Alternatively:  podman push jobapp:part1 <your-user>/jobapp:part1

3. Apply to Kyma cluster ☁️

In order to work with Kyma (which is in fact, a Kubernetes cluster with additional custom resource definitions) we need a Kubeconfig to authenticate and the kubectl CLI

3.1 Download and setup Kubeconfig 📥

Open the BTP Cockpit, under your subaccount go to "Overview" and find the section "Kyma Environment" and click on "KubeconfigURL". This will download the kubeconfig file to your local PC.

Then open your terminal (Mac, Linux)

export KUBECONFIG=<location of the downloaded file>

For windows use: Powershell: $env:KUBECONFIG = "…\kubeconfig.yaml", to verify: echo $env:KUBECONFIG 

CMD: set KUBECONFIG=…\kubeconfig.yaml, to verify: echo %KUBECONFIG%

3.2 Create a namespace 🏷️

It's a good practice to use separate namespaces, which is why we will create one for this exercise.

kubectl create namespace jobapp-part1

3.3 Create manifest.yaml 📜

The manifest.yaml is like the mtad.yaml (MultiTarget Application), but for Kubernetes

This YAML file contains all of the configuration for the Kyma cluster to deploy our application, expose an endpoint, create a service instance and bindings and mount them to the deployment of our application.

Note that you need to fill:

image: <your-username>/jobapp:part1
(...)
host: jobapp-part1-<your-suffix>.<kyma-apps-domain>

You can find help as comments in the manifest.yaml.

# defining the service instance
apiVersion: services.cloud.sap.com/v1
kind: ServiceInstance
metadata:
  # this will be the name of your service instance
  name: jobscheduler-instance
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: jobscheduler-instance
  annotations: {}
  namespace: jobapp-part1
spec:
  # the values supplied here are the ones from the Service Marketplace
  # serviceOfferingName is the "Technical name" of the Job Scheduling Service
  serviceOfferingName: jobscheduler
  servicePlanName: standard
---
# defining the Service Binding
apiVersion: services.cloud.sap.com/v1
kind: ServiceBinding
metadata:
  # this will be the name of your service binding
  name: jobscheduler-binding
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: jobscheduler-binding
  annotations: {}
  namespace: jobapp-part1
spec:
  # specify the name of the service-instance
  serviceInstanceName: jobscheduler-instance
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  namespace: jobapp-part1
  name: jobapp
  labels:
    run: jobapp
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  ports:
    - port: 80
      targetPort: 80
      protocol: TCP
      name: http
  selector:
    app: jobapp
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  namespace: jobapp-part1
  name: jobapp
  labels:
    app: jobapp
    version: nodejs
spec:
  replicas: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: jobapp
      version: nodejs
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: jobapp
        version: nodejs
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: jobapp
          # replace <your-username> with your Dockerhub image namespace/user
          image: <your-username>/jobapp:part1
          imagePullPolicy: Always
          ports:
            - containerPort: 80
          env:
            - name: SERVICE_BINDING_ROOT
              value: /bindings
          # this mounts a volume from the service-binding    
          volumeMounts:
            - mountPath: /bindings/jobscheduler-instance
              name: jobscheduler-volume
              readOnly: true
      volumes:
          # creates volume for the binding secret
        - name: jobscheduler-volume
          secret:
            defaultMode: 420
            secretName: jobscheduler-binding
---
apiVersion: gateway.kyma-project.io/v1beta1
kind: APIRule
metadata:
  namespace: jobapp-part1
  name: jobapp
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: jobapp
spec:
  gateway: kyma-gateway.kyma-system.svc.cluster.local
  rules:
    - accessStrategies:
        - handler: allow
          config: {}
      methods:
        - GET
        - POST
        - PUT
        - DELETE
      path: /.*
  # host is the address that your app will be accessible over
  # you can get <kyma-apps-domain> from the APIServerURL in the cockpit by removing the https://api or
  # by executing: kubectl config view --minify --output 'jsonpath={.clusters[0].cluster.server}' | sed 's#^https://api.##'
  # <your-suffix> can whatever you want - as long the the DNS is unique
  host: jobapp-part1-<your-suffix>.<kyma-apps-domain>
  service:
    name: jobapp
    port: 80

3.4 Apply changes to the cluster 🚀

kubectl apply -f manifest.yaml

4. Validate the application ✅

Now that your application is deployed it's time to test it

Open your endpoint in the browser (for example https://jobapp-part1-<your-suffix>.<kyma-apps-domain>/runjob)

You should have specified this URL in the manifest.yaml (host)

5. Testing the Job Scheduling Service 🕒

5.1 Permissions for Dashboard 🔑

To view the Dashboard your user has to have the SAP_Job_Scheduling_Service_Admin Role assigned from the BTP cockpit.

  1. In your subaccount, from the "Security" menu, choose "Role Collections".
  2. Press "Create".
  3. In the dialog add a name SAP Job Scheduling Service Admin and description Assign it to access Job Scheduling Service Dashboard and manage jobs, then press "Create".
  4. Press on the newly created role collection "SAP Job Scheduling Service Admin".
  5. Press "Edit" and add "Roles".
  6. Find SAP_Job_Scheduling_Service_Admin, mark it in the list and press "Add".
  7. Press "Save" on the role collection,
  8. From the "Security" menu, go to "Users".
  9. Find your user, press on it, then press "Assign Role Collection".
  10. From the list find "SAP Job Scheduling Service Admin", mark it, and then press "Assign Role Collection".

5.2 Link to the Dashboard 🔗

The Dashboard URL can be found from the BTP cockpit -> Instances and Subscriptions -> click on the "jobscheduler" Service Instance

5.3 Create job 📝

  1. From the Job Scheduler Dashboard, choose “Jobs” on the left hand menu.
  2. Then press the button “Create Job”.
  3. In the creation dialog, specify the required information:
    • Name - this is the technical name, for example: jobapp_get_runjob 
    • Action - this is the endpoint of your service that we want to call (from step 4) https://jobapp-part1-<your-suffix>.<kyma-apps-domain>/runjob 
    • HTTP Method - in our case GET is correct
  4. Press "Save" and the dialog will be closed
  5. Then press on the "Name" of the newly created job. The Overview page will open.
  6. From the left hand menu choose "Schedules" and press "Create Schedule" button
  7. For "value" enter now and press "Save" (this means that the scheduler will be executed only one time - now)
  8. Press on the "Description" of the newly created schedule. The Overview page will open.
  9. From the left hand menu choose "Run Logs" to see the executions for this schedule
  10. If you press on "Runlog ID" you can see more details about the specific run (execution)

🎉 That's it! 🎉

🥳 You have done it - you have successfully called your newly developed Kyma application using SAP Job Scheduling Service.

6. Cleanup

After you are ready you can delete all of your resources using

kubectl delete -f manifest.yaml

so that you are ready for our 🔝 next tutorial 🔝.

 

Troubleshooting🛠️

Q: Error on kubectl apply?

A: Have you created your namespace? If not use

kubectl create namespace jobapp-part1

Q: kubectl apply is successful, but the application is not working?

A: You can open the Kyma UI to validate that all resources are correctly provisioned.

OR You can use following and check for the READY field

kubectl -n jobapp-part1 get all,serviceinstance,servicebindings,APIRule

Q: Is my service instance created?

A: You can check using the 

kubectl -n jobapp-part1 describe serviceinstance.services.cloud.sap.com/jobscheduler-instance or in the Kyma

UI:

Q: How to remove my resources?

A: Use CLI

kubectl delete -f manifest.yaml

Or manually in the Kyma UI

Q: When I call the application endpoint I get: no healthy upstream

Option 1: Check your pods, especially your Docker image - have you added your username?

  1. kubectl -n jobapp-part1 get pods
  2. kubectl -n jobapp-part1 describe jobapp-<unique-id-from-previous-step>

Option 2: Do you have enough quota for the Job Scheduling Service? Execute:

kubectl -n jobapp-part1 describe serviceinstance.services.cloud.sap.com/jobscheduler-instance

If you see something like the following, your quota is not enough and you need to increase it.

Status:
  Conditions:
    Last Transition Time:  2024-09-13T10:07:26Z
    Message:               BrokerError:, Status: 400, Description: Subaccount quota limit for specified service plan has exceeded. Please contact service administrator.
    Observed Generation:   1
    Reason:                CreateInProgress
    Status:                False
    Type:                  Succeeded
    Last Transition Time:  2024-09-13T10:07:26Z
    Message:
    Reason:                NotProvisioned

entry.title: Re: Message Definition like Service interface in Sproxy i...
entry.content:
Use the metadata repository to create any namespaces (SPXNGENAPPL), and then you can use SPROXY to create any data types, message types and service consumers/providers as required.

 

Regards,

Ryan Crosby

entry.title: Re: liberation strategy connection
entry.content:
hello @SBach 
thank you for your answer.

Answering your question: With the approval strategy are workitems created?

my answer: I don't know, I will find out.

On the other hand, thanks for the course you sent me but I was looking for free and faster SAP information, that is to say to see the course I would have to wait several days.
My system is a:SAP S/4HANA 2022 FPS02.

Anyway thanks for your reply, greetings!

entry.title: Re: Attachments2 using HttpClient and C#
entry.content: Hi a suggestion: Can you please reproduce this code on your side. Anything please feel free to contact me. Thanks. Jorge

entry.title: How to continue executing batch job even after error
entry.content:
Hello,

I have a requirement where i have to continue batch job even after error and the job should not cancel and the message should appear as error not like information or warning in the job log.

entry.title: Automatic Subaccount Migration to another Region
entry.content:
Hi All!

Besides the SAP Note https://me.sap.com/notes/0003041304 with instructions on how to migrate a subaccount's contents from one region to another, Is there any tool to automate at least part of this migration process?

entry.title: Re: Cheat sheet for URI patterns for calling OData actions and functions
entry.content:
I have now been able to put together a working OData V4 URL for the static function. I have understood, that in V4 my static function was bound to a collection.

So the syntax is <pathToService>/<EntitySet>/<Schema Namespace>.<functionName>

My above example works with this URL:

entry.title: Re: Failed to get OData service metadata document. Please...
entry.content:
Hi bill, sorry for the late response. I try what you say and now i´m getting a 401 response

.

entry.title: Re: Where can I find the change number used in MM12 trans...
entry.content: Thanks, Ankurch, but again, the change is scheduled (MM12) but has not yet happened.  I can see the change in MM14, but I cannot see the change number used to make the change.  After the change has been executed, then it will show up under the material in Display Changes.  At this point, there does not appear to be a good way to see what the change number is that was used for the MM12 transaction.

entry.title: Process Automation: Unattended agent is disconnected automatically
entry.content:
Hi all,

I created an automated process in SAP Build Process Automation. The process is started with a scheduled timer. The process works exactly fine when my computer is active and I can see that the agent is active.

However, when I do not have my computer "active", the agent is automatically put to disconnected. When I go to Monitor > Automated Jobs, I can see that the job is set to "Ready" with the comment "Your job cannot be distributed because no unattended agent is available". Also, if I put the agent to unattended and close my computer, I get the same error because the agent is set to "Disconnected".

Is it possible to let an agent run the process even though your computer is off?

Thanks,

Stefanie

entry.title: Re: in Odata metadata not loaded it is not activating
entry.content: more detail.

entry.title: Re: How many user use Single SAP ID at same time SAP Business One
entry.content: SAP ID means , User which has assigned SAP B1 license to use SAP B1

entry.title: Goods receipt price based supplier confirmed price EDI1 condition
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We have a business case, where the supplier confirms for PO placed and after confirmation IDoc ORDRSP processing, EDI1 condition updates into PO but during GR, the EDI1 condition is not picking instead PB00 condition is picked for WRX account.

Can you please help how to route the posting to pick the EDI1 condition price as priority otherwise PB00 as next condition.

Thanks!

entry.title: Re: Missing Adaptation after Deployment to Fiori Launchpad
entry.content:
you don't have to create semantic object, you just have to remove the standard target mapping from your role.

make sure  semantic objct+action point only to your z target mapping

entry.title: Re: SAP MDG BP SOA - No confirmation message available wh...
entry.content:
Hello Louis,

Did you manage to find a solution to this issue ? 

Your inputs will be appreciated 🙂

Regards,

Udaya Shankar

entry.title: Custom field logic
entry.content:
Is modifying custom field logic in purchase item able to retrieve sales order item's information?

Customer requires to copy the sales item's long text from SO to PR custom shipment remark field when it is created from MRP. Is this possible?

entry.title: Re: occurs obsolete abap
entry.content: DATA: gt_test Type table of ZTEST.
